# The Incline Life — Luxury Fitness & Recovery Club, Udaipur

> Premium fitness destination in Udaipur, Rajasthan offering world-class Panatta equipment, elite personal training, group classes, recovery facilities (sauna, steam, ice bath), and a state-of-the-art recovery lounge.

## About
The Incline Life by Incline is Udaipur's most luxurious fitness and recovery club. We provide an end-to-end wellness experience: strength training, cardio, group fitness classes, personal training, recovery therapies, nutrition coaching, and a curated retail store.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.theincline.in/): Overview of facilities, membership plans, trainers, and contact information
- [Member Login / Sign Up](https://www.theincline.in/auth): Member portal access

## Services Offered
- Personal Training (PT) with certified coaches
- Group Fitness Classes (HIIT, Yoga, CrossFit-style)
- Recovery Suite: Sauna, Steam Room, Ice Bath, Massage
- Nutrition & Diet Planning
- Body Composition Analysis
- Premium Locker Rentals
- Pro Shop / Supplements

## Locations
- Udaipur, Rajasthan, India

## Contact
- Website: https://www.theincline.in
- Brand: The Incline Life by Incline

## Membership
Multiple flexible plans available — monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, and annual options. PT packages and class-based plans available. Visit the website or contact us for current pricing.
